chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-294 of 2025 (Muhammad Asif Khoso v. The State) Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Post-Arrest Bail 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 19-05-2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for Applicant. Mr. Muhammad Farooque Ali Jatoi, Special Prosecutor, ANF. **** After arguing the matter at some length, counsel for applicant submits that he would be satisfied and not press the instant bail application if directions are issued to the trial Court to conclude the trial within shortest possible time. Such proposal is not opposed by Special Prosecutor, ANF. Accordingly, instant bail application is disposed of as not pressed with directions to the trial Court to conclude the trial within sixty days. No unnecessary adjournment is to be granted to either party. If the prosecuting witnesses are not appearing before the trial Court, coercive measures be adopted to procure their appearance for recording their evidence. If trial Court feels that PWs are not appearing in spite of coercive process for recording their evidence, the trial Court is empowered to hear the bail application afresh, if the same is preferred. JUDGE Ahmad
